text.name: setting_camera_cameraMoveSpeed_tooltip
text.text: Base movement speed for the free camera in meters per second

text.name: setting_camera_cameraSprintMultiplier_tooltip
text.text: Speed multiplier when holding Shift while moving the free camera

text.name: setting_camera_cameraZoomMultiplier_tooltip
text.text: Zoom magnification level (2x = half FOV, 3x = third FOV, etc.)

text.name: setting_camera_cameraSpeedPreset1_tooltip
text.text: Speed preset activated by pressing 1 or A/X button on gamepad

text.name: setting_camera_cameraSpeedPreset2_tooltip
text.text: Speed preset activated by pressing 2 or B/Circle button on gamepad

text.name: setting_camera_cameraSpeedPreset3_tooltip
text.text: Speed preset activated by pressing 3 or X/Square button on gamepad

text.name: setting_camera_cameraSpeedPreset4_tooltip
text.text: Speed preset activated by pressing 4 or Y/Triangle button on gamepad
